requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — RSB Import Conformity (PVoC CoC), IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 as Baseline for Rwanda BESS Project and Regulatory Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——RSB进口合格评定（PVoC CoC）、IEC 62619和IEC 62133作为卢旺达BESS项目和监管验收基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——RSB進口合格評定（PVoC CoC）、IEC 62619和IEC 62133作為盧旺達BESS項目和監管驗收基準

summary.en: The Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) is the national standards body and product conformity authority. RSB adopts RS (Rwanda Standards) which are aligned with IEC international standards. RSB enforces import conformity through a PVoC (Pre-Export Verification of Conformity)-style scheme requiring a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) from an RSB-recognised conformity assessment body before customs clearance. For BESS cells and modules, the applicable RS standards reference IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) and IEC 62133 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications). IEC 62619 is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules in stationary applications and is required in DFI-financed project specifications. IEC 62133 may be required for smaller BESS modules and solar home system (SHS) batteries — a common application in Rwanda's rural electrification programmes. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based Energy Storage Systems) is expected in project-level specifications for utility-scale and mini-grid BESS systems. Exporters must verify the current RSB regulated-product list and PVoC CoC requirements directly with RSB and the appointed inspection body before shipment.
summary.zh: 卢旺达标准局（RSB）是国家标准机构和产品合格评定机关。RSB采用与IEC国际标准接轨的RS（卢旺达标准）。RSB通过PVoC（装运前合格评定）式制度执行进口合格评定，要求在清关前由RSB认可的合格评定机构出具合格证书（CoC）。对于BESS电芯和模组，适用RS标准引用IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）和IEC 62133（便携式应用二次锂电池安全要求）。IEC 62619是固定式应用锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，DFI融资项目规格中予以要求。IEC 62133可能适用于较小型BESS模组和太阳能家庭系统（SHS）电池——这是卢旺达农村电气化项目中的常见应用。IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）在公用事业规模和微电网BESS系统的项目级规格中被引用。出口商须在出货前直接向RSB及指定检验机构核实现行RSB受监管产品清单和PVoC CoC要求。
summary.zht: 盧旺達標準局（RSB）是國家標準機構和產品合格評定機關。RSB採用與IEC國際標準接軌的RS（盧旺達標準）。RSB通過PVoC（裝運前合格評定）式制度執行進口合格評定，要求在清關前由RSB認可的合格評定機構出具合格證書（CoC）。對於BESS電芯和模組，適用RS標準引用IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）和IEC 62133（便攜式應用二次鋰電池安全要求）。IEC 62619是固定式應用鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，DFI融資項目規格中予以要求。IEC 62133可能適用於較小型BESS模組和太陽能家庭系統（SHS）電池——這是盧旺達農村電氣化項目中的常見應用。IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）在公用事業規模和微電網BESS系統的項目級規格中被引用。出口商須在出貨前直接向RSB及指定檢驗機構核實現行RSB受監管產品清單和PVoC CoC要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Rwanda project specifications and RSB import conformity)

IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems (may apply to smaller BESS modules and SHS batteries in Rwanda rural electrification projects)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected DFI project-specification reference for utility-scale and mini-grid BESS)

RSB (Rwanda Standards Board) — national standards body; PVoC-style import conformity scheme requiring CoC from RSB-recognised body before customs clearance (verify current regulated-product list and CoC requirements directly with RSB)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 or IEC 62133 and are not accepted as substitutes for RSB import conformity assessment, RURA licensing review, or DFI project specifications in Rwanda. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 (and IEC 62133 where applicable) type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance, and must present a CoC from an RSB-recognised body before customs clearance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619或IEC 62133协调，不被RSB进口合格评定、RURA许可审查或卢旺达DFI项目规格接受为替代依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619（及适用时IEC 62133）型式试验证书，并须在清关前提供由RSB认可机构出具的CoC。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619或IEC 62133協調，不被RSB進口合格評定、RURA許可審查或盧旺達DFI項目規格接受為替代依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619（及適用時IEC 62133）型式試驗證書，並須在清關前提供由RSB認可機構出具的CoC。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: RSB import conformity requires a CoC from an RSB-recognised body demonstrating conformance to applicable RS/IEC standards — Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and will not satisfy RSB import conformity requirements. DFI project specifications and RURA licensing review reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Exporters should: (a) verify the current RSB regulated-product list and confirm the applicable RS standards and RSB-recognised conformity assessment body for BESS cells and modules before committing to an export programme; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Rwanda BESS projects; (c) for SHS or mini-grid battery modules that fall within IEC 62133 scope, obtain IEC 62133 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (d) engage an RSB-recognised conformity assessment body early to determine pre-shipment CoC documentation requirements; (e) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition and scope referenced in the project specification or RURA licensing conditions before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：RSB进口合格评定要求由RSB认可机构出具证明符合适用RS/IEC标准的CoC——中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不能满足RSB进口合格评定要求。DFI项目规格和RURA许可审查将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。出口商应：（a）在启动出口计划前核实现行RSB受监管产品清单，并确认BESS电芯和模组适用的RS标准及RSB认可的合格评定机构；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至卢旺达BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）对于属于IEC 62133范围的SHS或微电网电池模组，从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62133型式试验证书；（d）尽早聘请RSB认可的合格评定机构，确定装运前CoC文件要求；（e）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或RURA许可条件中引用的IEC 62619版本和范围。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：RSB進口合格評定要求由RSB認可機構出具證明符合適用RS/IEC標準的CoC——中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不能滿足RSB進口合格評定要求。DFI項目規格和RURA許可審查將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。出口商應：（a）在啟動出口計劃前核實現行RSB受監管產品清單，並確認BESS電芯和模組適用的RS標準及RSB認可的合格評定機構；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至盧旺達BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）對於屬於IEC 62133範圍的SHS或微電網電池模組，從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62133型式試驗證書；（d）儘早聘請RSB認可的合格評定機構，確定裝運前CoC文件要求；（e）在啟動測試計劃前確認項目規格或RURA許可條件中引用的IEC 62619版本和範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RSB PVoC-style CoC required before customs clearance for regulated products; IEC 62619 is the expected technical baseline in DFI project specifications and RURA licensing review; verify current RSB regulated-product scope and CoC requirements directly with RSB
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RSB import conformity (PVoC-style CoC) is a mandatory pre-shipment gate for regulated products imported into Rwanda; Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone does not satisfy RSB conformity requirements or DFI project specifications which reference IEC 62619. Obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory and engage an RSB-recognised conformity assessment body before shipment. For SHS or mini-grid battery modules within IEC 62133 scope, obtain IEC 62133 certificates. Verify current RSB regulated-product scope and CoC documentation requirements directly with RSB and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, RURA, and any appointed conformity assessment body before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] RSB进口合格评定（PVoC式CoC）是进口至卢旺达受监管产品的强制装运前门槛；仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不满足RSB合格评定要求或引用IEC 62619的DFI项目规格。出货前须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书，并聘请RSB认可的合格评定机构。对于属于IEC 62133范围的SHS或微电网电池模组，须取得IEC 62133证书。在设备采购最终确定前，直接向RSB核实现行受监管产品范围和CoC文件要求，并向项目业主、RURA及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] RSB進口合格評定（PVoC式CoC）是進口至盧旺達受監管產品的強制裝運前門檻；僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不滿足RSB合格評定要求或引用IEC 62619的DFI項目規格。出貨前須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書，並聘請RSB認可的合格評定機構。對於屬於IEC 62133範圍的SHS或微電網電池模組，須取得IEC 62133證書。在設備採購最終確定前，直接向RSB核實現行受監管產品範圍和CoC文件要求，並向項目業主、RURA及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。
